---
title: Health Insurance
author: YOUR NAME
date: 2024-04-28
categories: [r, tidyverse, data-analysis, health-insurance]
image: health-ins.png

execute: 
  warning: false
  message: false
  
toc: true
---
```{r}
#| include: false

library(knitr)
library(rmarkdown)
library(tidyverse)
library(skimr)
library(ggthemes)
library(hrbrthemes)

theme_set(theme_ipsum()+
          theme(strip.background =element_rect(fill="lightgray"),
                axis.title.x  = element_text(angle = 0,
                                            size = rel(1.5),
                                            margin = margin(10,0,0,0)),
                axis.title.y  = element_text(angle = 0,
                                            size = rel(1.5),
                                            margin = margin(0,10,0,0))
                )
          )
```

Let's analyze the `health_ins` data:

...
